name: QA Scoring – Three Gens Talks
description: Patch summary: Migrated OpenAI auth to EnvironmentVariables / Build Config pattern. Aligned returned QA field names with canonical Three Gens pipeline vocabulary (hook_strength, interaction_quality, naturalness, standalone_clarity, engagement_payoff). Preserved webhook-based external evaluator role. Kept strict JSON output and hard-fail logic.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Webhook: Receive Script').first().json;

const systemPrompt =
  'You are a strict QA evaluator for YouTube Shorts scripts for the "Three Gens Talks" channel. ' +
  'The channel features three generations (grandmother/SAM, mother/ALEX, daughter/RILEY) in short ' +
  'conversational clips. Return ONLY valid JSON with no additional text, markdown, or explanation.';

const scriptText = JSON.stringify(input.script, null, 2);

const userPrompt =
  'Evaluate this YouTube Shorts script for quality assurance.\n\n' +
  'Idea ID: ' + input.idea_id + '\n' +
  'Idea Title: ' + input.idea_title + '\n\n' +
  'Script:\n' + scriptText + '\n\n' +
  'Score each dimension from 1 to 10:\n' +
  '- hook_strength: Does the opening hook the viewer immediately within 2 seconds?\n' +
  '- interaction_quality: Does dialogue feel like a real 3-way conversation with genuine reactions?\n' +
  '- naturalness: Does the dialogue sound like real speech not scripted performance?\n' +
  '- standalone_clarity: Would a viewer with no context understand and enjoy this?\n' +
  '- engagement_payoff: Does the ending land with a satisfying twist, laugh, or insight that drives engagement?\n' +
  '- moment_clarity: (auxiliary) Is there a single clear specific relatable moment driving the script?\n' +
  '- escalation_strength: (auxiliary) Does tension or humor escalate naturally toward the payoff?\n' +
  '- persona_distinction: (auxiliary) Are all three personas clearly distinct in voice and perspective?\n' +
  '- relatability: (auxiliary) Will multigenerational families immediately recognize this situation?\n' +
  '- safety_brand_fit: (auxiliary hard gate) Is content safe for all ages and aligned with a warm positive brand?\n\n' +
  'Hard fail conditions — list the reason string in hard_fail_reasons if triggered:\n' +
  '- no valid relatable moment identified\n' +
  '- hook_strength below 7\n' +
  '- interaction_quality below 7\n' +
  '- escalation_strength below 7\n' +
  '- engagement_payoff below 6\n' +
  '- safety_brand_fit below 9\n' +
  '- invalid script format\n' +
  '- personas are interchangeable (same voice could say any line)\n' +
  '- content is explanatory or informational rather than conversational and dramatic\n\n' +
  'Return ONLY this exact JSON structure with no other text:\n' +
  '{\n' +
  '  "scores": {\n' +
  '    "hook_strength": 0,\n' +
  '    "interaction_quality": 0,\n' +
  '    "naturalness": 0,\n' +
  '    "standalone_clarity": 0,\n' +
  '    "engagement_payoff": 0,\n' +
  '    "moment_clarity": 0,\n' +
  '    "escalation_strength": 0,\n' +
  '    "persona_distinction": 0,\n' +
  '    "relatability": 0,\n' +
  '    "safety_brand_fit": 0\n' +
  '  },\n' +
  '  "hard_fail_reasons": [],\n' +
  '  "main_issues": [],\n' +
  '  "fix_instructions": [],\n' +
  '  "decision": "APPROVED"\n' +
  '}';

return [{
  json: {
    idea_id: input.idea_id,
    idea_title: input.idea_title,
    script: input.script,
    retry_count: input.retry_count || 0,
    prompt_version: input.prompt_version,
    content_strategy_version: input.content_strategy_version,
    openai_payload: {
      model: 'gpt-4o',
      temperature: 0.1,
      response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
      messages: [
        { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
        { role: 'user', content: userPrompt }
      ]
    }
  }
}];

const input = items[0].json;
return [{
  json: {
    status: 'REJECTED',
    rejection_type: 'HARD_FAIL',
    pipeline_stage: 'archive',
    idea_id: input.idea_id,
    idea_title: input.idea_title,
    retry_count: input.retry_count,
    prompt_version: input.prompt_version,
    content_strategy_version: input.content_strategy_version,
    qa_result: {
      weighted_score: input.weighted_score,
      hook_strength: input.hook_strength,
      interaction_quality: input.interaction_quality,
      naturalness: input.naturalness,
      standalone_clarity: input.standalone_clarity,
      engagement_payoff: input.engagement_payoff,
      scores: input.scores,
      hard_fail_reasons: input.hard_fail_reasons,
      main_issues: input.main_issues,
      fix_instructions: input.fix_instructions,
      decision: 'REJECTED',
      qa_timestamp: input.qa_timestamp
    }
  }
}];

const input = items[0].json;
return [{
  json: {
    status: 'RETRY',
    pipeline_stage: 'script_generator',
    idea_id: input.idea_id,
    idea_title: input.idea_title,
    script: input.script,
    retry_count: input.retry_count,
    prompt_version: input.prompt_version,
    content_strategy_version: input.content_strategy_version,
    qa_result: {
      weighted_score: input.weighted_score,
      hook_strength: input.hook_strength,
      interaction_quality: input.interaction_quality,
      naturalness: input.naturalness,
      standalone_clarity: input.standalone_clarity,
      engagement_payoff: input.engagement_payoff,
      scores: input.scores,
      hard_fail_reasons: input.hard_fail_reasons,
      main_issues: input.main_issues,
      fix_instructions: input.fix_instructions,
      decision: 'RETRY',
      qa_timestamp: input.qa_timestamp
    }
  }
}];
